sources.title: Artificial Intelligence in Retail Market Size, Share & Growth Report 2033
sources.claim: Global AI in retail market valued at $18.4B in 2026, projected to reach $130.88B by 2033 at ~32.8% CAGR; North America holds 39.4% of global AI retail spend

sources.title: Generative AI-Powered Shopping Rises with Traffic to US Retail Sites
sources.claim: GenAI traffic to US retail sites surged +393% YoY in Q1 2026 (Jan–Mar); AI-referred visitors convert 42% better than non-AI traffic; holiday 2025 saw +693% YoY AI traffic

sources.title: 2026 Personalization Trends: What 1,000+ Shoppers Expect From Brands
sources.claim: 44% of Gen Z already use AI to shop; 90% of Gen Z AI shoppers report improved experience (2026); 68% of shoppers want brands to learn from their habits over time

sources.title: Gen Z Shoppers Lead All Generations in Using AI for Purchases
sources.claim: Gen Z leads all generations in AI shopping adoption; 58% of Millennials use or plan to use AI for shopping; consumer behavior data cross-referenced with capital one shopping research

sources.title: Applied AI in Retail and E-Commerce Market Size to Hit USD 376.48 Billion by 2035
sources.claim: Applied AI in retail & e-commerce market reaches $72.42B in 2026, growing to $376.48B by 2035; AI spending in retail grew from $6.4B in 2021 to $18.4B+ in 2026

sources.title: EU AI Act 2026 Compliance Requirements for Enterprises
sources.claim: EU AI Act full enforcement August 2026; AI recommendation systems must disclose AI role; high-risk classification for systems processing sensitive behavioral data

sources.title: AI in Retail: 10 Use Cases and an Implementation Guide (2026)
sources.claim: Shopify reports 15x order growth from AI search interfaces; AI personalization use cases, implementation benchmarks, and conversion data for retail

sources.title: AI Traffic Surge: Retail Sites Not Machine-Readable
sources.claim: AI shopping bots drive significant retail traffic; most retail sites lack structured data for AI readability; urgency for retailers to optimize for AI-native search surfaces

sources.title: 63 AI Personalization in eCommerce Lift Statistics – 400% ROI (2026)
sources.claim: Personalized recommendations drive 18–30% uplift in average order value; 24% higher click-through rates vs. static recommendations; 87% of retailers report revenue lift from AI

sources.title: 10 AI Use Cases for Retail with ROI Benchmarks (DACH 2026)
sources.claim: AI dynamic pricing delivers 3–6% gross margin improvement; AI inventory optimization reduces excess stock 15–30%; product recommendation implementation cost €30–80K with 8–12 week payback

unverified_claims.claim: Amazon's consumables auto-replenishment segment grew significantly in 2025
unverified_claims.note: General directional claim — exact % growth not confirmed by public Amazon filing; directional trend verified via multiple retail analyst sources

unverified_claims.claim: Zara recommendation engine boosted basket sizes by 14%
unverified_claims.note: Cited in multiple retail AI articles as a Zara use case; no primary Zara press release found confirming exact figure — treat as industry estimate

unverified_claims.claim: 110K+/mo combined search volume for AI retail personalization terms
unverified_claims.note: Estimated from aggregating related search queries ('AI shopping assistant', 'personalized shopping AI', 'AI product recommendations'); not directly verified via Keywords Everywhere API
